item.title: “Landman”'s Michelle Randolph Admits She Asked Her On-Screen Dad Billy Bob Thornton If He 'Drank Angelina Jolie's Blood'
item.description: "Most of my scenes are with him, and I’m thinking, 'God, like what, all I know is that he drank Angelina Jolie’s blood or something,' " the actress sa...

item.title: How David Archuleta Confronted Alleged Childhood Abuse That Made Him Feel ‘Worthless’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The 'American Idol' alum also writes about overcoming suicidal thoughts and leaving the Mormon Church in his new memoir 'Devout'

item.title: Tyra Banks Says 'Black Girl Stuff' Ignited 'We Were Rooting for You' Outburst at Tiffany on “America's Next Top Model”
item.description: The host's screaming fit went viral and remains one of the series' most infamous moments

item.title: TikTok Star Your Rich BFF Reveals the Worst Piece of Financial Advice She's Ever Received (Exclusive)
item.description: Vivian Tu insists that not all debt is bad, and reveals which debt she thinks isn't worth paying off right away

item.title: Lucie Arnaz Praises How Parents Lucille Ball and Desi Arnaz Were 'Still Connected' After Divorce (Exclusive)
item.description: The couple was married from 1940 to 1960
